title: Trademarked
description: A modpack with tech and guns, ripe for an industrial revolution to take place.
body:
From the fields of Minecraft, this modpack is aimed at delivering you a fun and new experience! From creating a industrial revolution to having full blown wars, the choice is yours. This adds new challenges from a harder final boss to having to deal with industrializaion to fully exploiting all the materials you have in the overworld and a mining dimension.

--Legal
[advanced-mining-dimension](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-mining-dimension)
[simple-voice-chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
